name: image
description: Analyze local image files using a vision-capable LLM. Reuses provider credentials already configured in Beige — no separate API key needed.
commands: analyze <path>                          — Analyze a local image file, returns description
analyze <path> --prompt "<question>"     — Ask a specific question about the image

analyzeProvider.description: Name of the llm.providers entry to use for image analysis. Must be a vision-capable model (e.g. 'anthropic' for Claude, 'openai' for GPT-4o). Credentials are resolved automatically from auth.json / OAuth / env vars.
